name: Saripetojo Burger
description: Juicy beef patty topped with a fried egg, fresh lettuce, caramelized onions, pickles, and tomato, served with French fries and coleslaw.

name: Cheese Burger
description: A juicy beef patty with melted mozzarella cheese, fresh lettuce, caramelized onions, pickles, and tomato, served in a soft burger bun with French fries and coleslaw.

name: The Club Sandwich
description: Layers of grilled chicken and smoked beef with cheddar cheese, fried egg, pickles, tomato, and caramelized onions, served on focaccia bread with French fries and coleslaw.

name: Tenderloin Steak
description: Australian beef cooked to perfection with vegetables and your choice of sauce.

name: Cheese Cake
description: Baked cheesecake with smooth texture and balanced flavour.

name: Espresso
description: Freshly brewed espresso with a bold aroma.
